title: Functions, duties and powers of President

content.text: The President shall exercise such powers and perform such duties as conferred to him or her pursuant to this Constitution or a Federal law.
In exercising the powers or duties under clause

, the President shall perform all other functions to be performed by him or her on recommendation and with the consent of the Council of Ministers than those functions specifically provided to be performed on recommendation of any body or official under this Constitution or Federal Law. Such recommendation and consent shall be submitted through the Prime Minister.
Any decision or order to be issued in the name of the President under clause
and other instrument of authorization pertaining thereto shall be authenticated as provided for in the Federal law.
